# MuleSoft Partner Manager

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.x) of Partner Manager documentation.
> See [Partner Manager llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/partner-manager/llms-full.txt) for all the Partner Manager documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Accessing Source Message Attributes](https://docs.mulesoft.com/partner-manager/latest/access-source-message-attributes.md)
